title: Trial removal
excerpt: Hello, I’m trying to remove the Trial from our app, but in Preview it still says there is a Trial. Are we not allowed to remove Trial altogether?

posts.author: muf711 (Alexandru Gabriel)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I’m trying to remove the Trial from our app, but in Preview it still says there is a Trial. Are we not allowed to remove Trial altogether?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @muf711,

Are you able to access the board you had with the review team so that you can review this with them?
